debug_info.goal:
a : Type
x : a
xs : List a
ih :
  (List.map reverse xs.reverse.tails).reverse =
    List.map (Chapter3.SymList.fromSL a)
      (List.scanl (@flip a (Chapter3.SymList a) (Chapter3.SymList a) (Chapter3.SymList.snocSL a))
        (Chapter3.SymList.nil a) xs)
⊢ List.map reverse (xs.reverse ++ [x]).tails =
    (List.map (Chapter3.SymList.fromSL a)
          (List.scanl (@flip a (Chapter3.SymList a) (Chapter3.SymList a) (Chapter3.SymList.snocSL a))
            (Chapter3.SymList.snocSL a x (Chapter3.SymList.nil a)) xs)).reverse ++
      [Chapter3.SymList.fromSL a (Chapter3.SymList.nil a)]

failed_attempts:
rw [tails_append_singleton, List.map_append]
    simp only [List.map_map]
    have h : (fun ys => List.reverse (ys ++ [x])) = (fun ys => x :: List.reverse ys) := by funext; simp
    rw [h, ← List.map_map (List.cons x), ← List.reverse_reverse (List.map List.reverse _), ih]
    simp only [map_reverse, SymList.nil, SymList.fromSL, List.reverse_singleton, List.append_nil]
    congr 1
    rw [← map_reverse]
    congr 1
    let rec aux (st1 st2 : SymList a) (h : SymList.fromSL st2 = x :: SymList.fromSL st1) (ys : List a) :
      List.map SymList.fromSL (List.scanl (flip SymList.snocSL) st2 ys) =
      List.map (x :: ·) (List.map SymList.fromSL (List.scanl (flip SymList.snocSL) st1 ys)) := by
      match ys with
      | [] => simp [h]
      | z :: zs => simp; exact ⟨h, aux _ _ (by simp [fromSL_snoc, h]) zs⟩
    exact (aux _ _ (by simp [SymList.fromSL, SymList.snocSL, SymList.nil]) xs).symm
